query: light leak film burn red orange flare expired film
message: sub:film_artifacts/light_leak — anti_aesthetic — color casts, lens flare, expired film color shifts

response.objective_caption: Circular and ovoid shapes of colored light in orange, green, red, and yellow overlap against a solid black background. A large orange circle dominates the upper center, while a descending arrangement of smaller multicolored circles and diffuse light forms fills the lower and middle portions of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph of colored light sources rendered unrecognizable through extreme intentional blur and soft focus, dissolving into overlapping circular and ovoid shapes in orange, green, red, and yellow against a solid black background. The composition abandons representational clarity, presenting a large orange orb in the upper center and a descending cascade of smaller multicolored light forms as an exploration of pure color, shape, and gestural luminosity.
